This opinion is supported by many astrologers including
Kaikulangara (the commentator of the famous Hridyapadha
commentry of Brihat Jataka available in malayalam).
But one thing should be remembered here - 'Prasuti' is a
technical terminology used ONLY to refer to a birth happened
BEFORE the completion of 10 Nakshtra months (i.e. 27 x 10
= =
270 days) and AFTER 6 months (i.e. 27 x 6 162 days).ln
this case the child may live and the birth time considered
should be the 'Prasuti', i.e. the time at which placenta breaks,
as per the sages. The quote that clarifies the meaning of the
word 'Prasuti' is given below.

Which is the correct Birth Time? 7
